steps.title: Locate the subject that the verb must agree with
steps.content: The subject is Jessie Redmon Fausetʼs contributions — a plural noun. The blank is where the main clause verb needs to go.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
A finite verb must agree in number with its subject. Have been revisited matches the plural subject with its plural auxiliary have. The other choices either fail to use a plural form, lack a finite auxiliary, or use a non-finite structure.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
